text:
/ci1 2 すまない、援護を頼めないか！
クリスマスの正装を着用してきたが
動きにくくてな……

/ci1 2 助力、感謝する。その腕は本物だ。
……賞賛はよせ。この装いはあくまでも
イベント参加のためだと言っている！

……精進不足のようだ。
すまない、次は必ず力になろう。

……無事か！　下がっていろ。
あとは任せるがい

Excuse me, could we have some backup? I put on
my formal Christmas wear, so it's kind of hard to
move now...

/ci1 2 Your aid is appreciated. Your skills are the real
deal! ...You know we're only wearing these uniforms
for the event, right?

...Guess we lacked focus. I'm sorry, but we'll sure
to be of more help next time.

...Are you hurt!? Fall back! You can leave the rest
to me.
